title: Unlawful sale or distribution of mitragynine speciosa to persons under age twenty-one; penalty.
doc_html:
§91.10. Unlawful sale or distribution of mitragynine speciosa to persons under age

            twenty-one; penalty.

            A. No person shall sell or distribute or cause to be sold or distributed a product containing mitragynine speciosa to any person under the age of twenty-one.

            B. For purposes of this Section, "mitragynine speciosa" means a product containing either or both of the following:

            (1) Mitragynine.

            (2) 7-Hydroxy-mitragynine.

            C. Whoever violates the provisions of this Section shall be fined not more than five hundred dollars, imprisoned for not more than six months, or both.

            Acts 2023, No. 416, §1.
doc_text:
§91.10. Unlawful sale or distribution of mitragynine speciosa to persons under age
twenty-one; penalty.
A. No person shall sell or distribute or cause to be sold or distributed a product
containing mitragynine speciosa to any person under the age of twenty-one.
B. For purposes of this Section, "mitragynine speciosa" means a product containing
either or both of the following:
(1) Mitragynine.
(2) 7-Hydroxy-mitragynine.
C. Whoever violates the provisions of this Section shall be fined not more than five
hundred dollars, imprisoned for not more than six months, or both.
Acts 2023, No. 416, §1.
